title: Enterprise Value: Calculate the enterprise value if the equity value is 500...
summary: Calculate enterprise value from equity value, debt, and cash components.
prompt: Calculate the enterprise value if the equity value is $500 million, the debt is $200 million, and cash is $50 million.
solution: Enterprise Value = Equity + Debt - Cash = $500 million + $200 million - $50 million = $650 million.
